nodes.context: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Southern Ontario, founded in Hamilton in 1948.
Motorcycle club that the Original Red Devils patched over to in late 2014.
Outlaw motorcycle club mentioned as having good relationships with the Original Red Devils.

edges.evidence_quote: They would end up patching over to long-time ally Bacchus Motorcycle Club in late 2014, with their three chapters Hamilton , Chatham-Kent , and Sudbury joining Bacchus MC.
edges.context: The Original Red Devils merged into Bacchus MC by patching over their chapters.

edges.evidence_quote: All of this has led to the Red Devils being "comfortable in their own skin," and have good relationships with other clubs, including the Hells Angels.
edges.context: The Original Red Devils have good relationships with Hells Angels.
